chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1403 of 2025 [Ghulam Akbar Mughal vs. PO Sindh & others] Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Ather Hussain Abro, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
